creative_brief: Split image showing supermarket produce shelf vs Rachel at her farm with cattle, emphasizing the direct connection and freshness difference.
primary_text: You know supermarket food travels 2,400km on average? Rachel's beef from the NSW coast reaches Sydney families in days, not weeks. No wholesalers marking it up. FarmThru connects you direct to named regenerative farms across NSW. Order what you want, collect from Brookvale Monday to Friday. Now you can invest from $50 and help build the grocery store you actually want.
headline: Invest in the grocery store you want
description: Farm-direct food from named NSW farms. Equity crowdfunding live on Birchal. Not financial advice.
